ModMetaData.name: VQE Deadlife (HSK/CE Patched)
ModMetaData.author: Oskar Potocki, Sarg Bjornson, Taranchuk, Ferny — HSK/CE patch by CarbineAction
ModMetaData.description:
HSK/CE-patched standalone version of Vanilla Quests Expanded — Deadlife, tuned for the Hardcore SK modpack.
This bundles the upstream VQE Deadlife mod content with HSK conventions and Combat Extended patches baked in. Do NOT enable the Steam Workshop version of VQE Deadlife alongside this — they would duplicate each other's defs.
HSK/CE patches included: - Material swaps on deconstructable ancient structures so deconstruction returns HSK-native refined materials: * Steel → SteelBar (Open/Closed Deadlife caskets, Dormant/Ancient Military Turrets, Kino Screen, Kino Projector) * Uranium → DepletedUranium (Open/Closed Deadlife caskets) * +ComponentIndustrial / +ComponentSpacer / +Plasteel layers added per HSK tech tier (industrial vs ultratech)
- Combat Extended patches for the 4 ancient weapons (Autopistol, Machine Pistol, Pump Shotgun, LMG) so they fire correctly under HSK CE: * 9×19mm Parabellum (Autopistol + Machine Pistol) * 12 Gauge Buckshot (Pump Shotgun) * 7.62×51mm NATO (LMG)
- HSK CE armor rescale on the Military Coat (Sharp 8 / Blunt 4 + Bulk 4.0 / WornBulk 1.4).
Original mod by Oskar Potocki, Sarg Bjornson, Taranchuk, Ferny. HSK/CE conversion by CarbineAction.
Required: Hardcore SK, Combat Extended, Anomaly DLC.
